evals.name: add-get-action-and-hook
evals.prompt: Add a new `getDelegations` action that returns staking delegations for the selected wallet, plus a `useDelegations` hook.

assertions.description: Creates action at packages/appkit/src/actions/staking/get-delegations.ts
Creates query at packages/appkit/src/queries/staking/get-delegations.ts
Creates hook at packages/appkit-react/src/features/staking/hooks/use-delegations.ts
Read action uses 'get' prefix (getDelegations, not fetchDelegations or loadDelegations)
Query exports getDelegationsQueryOptions factory with queryKey and queryFn
Hook calls useQuery with the query options factory, not duplicating logic
Adds exports to packages/appkit/src/actions/index.ts, queries/index.ts, and features/staking/index.ts

evals.name: tests-for-hook
evals.prompt: Write tests for the `useSwapQuote` hook in the @ton/appkit-react package.

assertions.description: Uses createWrapper from demo/examples/src/__tests__/test-utils.tsx for provider context
Mocks AppKit and swapManager (or its getQuote method) instead of hitting real DEX
Tests loading state (isLoading or pending state from useQuery)
Tests success path with returned quote data
Tests error path (mocked error from manager)
Uses vitest (describe/it/expect) and @testing-library/react renderHook

evals.name: tests-for-balance
evals.prompt: Write tests for the balance feature in the @ton/appkit package — covering the actions, queries, and the watch-balance cache update path.

assertions.description: Identifies balance-related files (use-balance, get-balance-by-address, etc.) before writing tests
Mocks networkManager and streamingManager on AppKit
Tests how watch hooks write streaming updates into the useBalance cache
Adds tests to the existing balances test file (not a new isolated one)

evals.name: orientation
evals.prompt: I just joined the project, how is everything organized here?

assertions.description: Names three packages: walletkit (lowest), appkit (middle), appkit-react (top)
Explains action / query / hook layering OR domain folders (balances, staking, swap, jettons, nft, signing, network, connectors, transaction)
Mentions `pnpm quality` (or equivalent: tests + lint + typecheck) as the verification command
Mentions named exports only (no default exports)

evals.name: debug-balance-stale-after-send
evals.prompt: I'm triaging a bug report on the AppKit SDK: a consumer says their `useBalance()` doesn't update after `useTransferTon` succeeds. Walk me through every cause I should check in the AppKit source and integration patterns, so I can tell the reporter what to fix or so I can fix it in the SDK.

assertions.description: Identifies missing invalidateQueries on transfer success as the most common cause
Mentions registering a streaming provider for real-time updates
Mentions mounting useWatchBalance alongside useBalance
Mentions network mismatch (mainnet/testnet) as a possible cause

evals.name: debug-disconnect-stale-data
evals.prompt: Bug report on the AppKit SDK: after a consumer disconnects a wallet and connects a different one, the previous wallet's balance and NFTs stay in the cache briefly. Fix the bug in the AppKit source (`use-disconnect` and friends) and update the matching tests.

assertions.description: Identifies appkit-react/src/features/wallets/hooks/use-disconnect.ts as the file to edit
Adds queryClient.removeQueries calls inside the onSuccess of useDisconnect
Uses removeQueries (not invalidateQueries) because no wallet to refetch for
Removes multiple keys: ['balance'], ['nfts'], ['jettons'], ['jetton-balance'], ['stakedBalance'] (note: jetton keys are kebab-case)
Preserves any existing onSuccess callback the consumer may pass (calls user's onSuccess too)
Mentions adding/updating tests in demo/examples/src/appkit/hooks/wallets/wallets.test.tsx

evals.name: watch-action-and-hook
evals.prompt: Add a `watchStakingQuote` action and a `useWatchStakingQuote` hook that subscribes to staking quote changes in real-time.

assertions.description: Creates watch action at packages/appkit/src/actions/staking/watch-staking-quote.ts
Action uses appKit.emitter.on(EVENT, ...) and returns unsubscribe function
Does NOT create a query file (watch actions skip the query layer)

Hook uses one of the two valid watch patterns: (a) useSyncExternalStore with subscribe+getSnapshot (like use-networks), OR (b) useEffect that calls the watch action and keeps a TanStack Query cache fresh (like use-watch-balance-by-address). Does NOT use useQuery.
Watch action uses 'watch' prefix (watchStakingQuote, not subscribeXxx or observeXxx)
Adds exports to actions/index.ts and features/staking/index.ts

evals.name: add-mutation-and-hook
evals.prompt: Add a `revokeStake` mutation action that revokes a user's stake at a given provider, plus a `useRevokeStake` hook.

assertions.description: Creates action at packages/appkit/src/actions/staking/revoke-stake.ts
Creates mutation file at packages/appkit/src/queries/staking/revoke-stake.ts (mutation options, not query options)
Hook uses useMutation, not useQuery
Hook returns the mutation result shape: mutate/mutateAsync, isPending, error, reset
Write action uses an imperative verb (revokeStake, not getRevoke or watchRevoke)
Adds exports to actions/index.ts, queries/index.ts, and features/staking/index.ts

evals.name: walletkit-barrel-boundary
evals.prompt: I'm adding a `getProtocolInfo` action that returns protocol metadata from the walletkit staking manager. The walletkit method returns a new `ProtocolMetadata` type that's not yet re-exported anywhere in appkit. Walk me through the changes.

assertions.description: Re-exports ProtocolMetadata in the appkit staking barrel: packages/appkit/src/staking/index.ts
Action imports ProtocolMetadata from the local barrel (../../staking), NOT from @ton/walletkit directly
Explains the rule: never import @ton/walletkit directly in packages/appkit source
Creates action + query + hook (the standard 3-layer pattern)
Adds exports to actions/index.ts, queries/index.ts, features/staking/index.ts

evals.name: incremental-action-exists
evals.prompt: I already added the `getStakingHistory` action at `packages/appkit/src/actions/staking/get-staking-history.ts`. Now create the query and the `useStakingHistory` hook for it.

assertions.description: Does NOT recreate or rewrite the existing action file
Creates packages/appkit/src/queries/staking/get-staking-history.ts
Creates packages/appkit-react/src/features/staking/hooks/use-staking-history.ts
Query exports getStakingHistoryQueryOptions factory with queryKey & queryFn
Hook calls useQuery(getStakingHistoryQueryOptions(appKit, parameters))
Adds barrel exports for query and hook (not action — already exported)

evals.name: ui-reusable-component
evals.prompt: Add a reusable `<Spinner size='sm' | 'md' | 'lg' />` component to AppKit React.

assertions.description: Component lives in packages/appkit-react/src/components/ui/spinner/ (or components/shared/ if it mixes business logic). Not feature-specific (features/<feature>/components/), not at the top level of components/.
Creates index.ts, spinner.tsx, spinner.module.css, spinner.stories.tsx (all four)
export const Spinner: FC<SpinnerProps> with named export (not default)
Uses clsx to switch CSS Module class based on size prop

Uses --ta-* design tokens (without px fallbacks) for colors, border-radius, and border-width. Component-internal dimensions (e.g. width/height for the three sizes) MAY use literal px — same pattern as existing components like button (which uses `width: 18px` for icon slots).
Storybook story shows all size variants (sm, md, lg)

evals.name: ui-feature-component
evals.prompt: Create a `<DelegationListItem delegation={...} />` component that renders one delegation in a list, used inside the staking feature.

assertions.description: Lives at packages/appkit-react/src/features/staking/components/delegation-list-item/ (feature-specific, not shared components/)
Creates index.ts, delegation-list-item.tsx, delegation-list-item.module.css, delegation-list-item.stories.tsx

Uses real --ta-* tokens (`--ta-color-*`, `--ta-border-radius-*`, `--ta-border-width-*`) without px fallbacks. Does NOT invent non-existent tokens (e.g. `--ta-spacing-*` does not exist in src/styles/index.css). Literal px is OK for padding/gap/margin and component-internal sizes.
Typography classes use `composes` from src/styles/typography.module.css (not duplicated font styles)
User-facing text uses useI18n hook (const { t } = useI18n()), not hardcoded strings

evals.name: ui-component-using-hook
evals.prompt: Build a `<StakingHistoryList />` feature component that uses the `useStakingHistory` hook and displays a list of past staking operations.

assertions.description: Lives at packages/appkit-react/src/features/staking/components/staking-history-list/
Imports and uses useStakingHistory hook
Renders a loading state when isLoading or data is undefined
Renders an error state when isError or error is present
Renders an empty state when list is empty

Uses real --ta-* tokens (`--ta-color-*`, `--ta-border-radius-*`, `--ta-border-width-*`) without px fallbacks. Does NOT invent non-existent tokens (e.g. `--ta-spacing-*` does not exist). Literal px is OK for padding/gap/margin.
